com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel
Class RSSNewsItem

java.lang.Object
  com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel.RSSNewsItem
public class RSSNewsItem
extends java.lang.Object

Model for a RSSNewsItem. A RSSChannel may contain more than one item.

Version:
0.63b
Author:
Benjamin Pasero
